content.text:
<timestamp>Wednesday, Jul 15, 2026, 3:09 AM (UTC+3:30)</timestamp>
<user_query>
توی این مرحله میخوام کاربران تستی که ایجاد کردم رو بری پیدا کنی chattest  هستن و چهار تا هم هستن فکر میکنم. اینها رو من به عنوان کاربران اپلیکیشن ایجاد کردم. میخوام همه اینا رو برداری و توی یه داکیومنت جدا گانه بذاری .  در مرحله بعدی کرسر رو ملزم و اجبار کنی بعد از هر پیاده سازی زمانی که بهش گفتم برو و با postman تست های integration بنویس واسم یه فایل مشخص داشته باشه کرسر و بتونه با اطلاعات اون چهار تا کاربر وارد بشه و یک تست کامل بگیره . پس وقتی که فایل رو هم ایجاد کردی رفرنسش رو هم بده و ملزم که حتما از اون استفاده کنه موقعی که میخواد از postman  برای تست استفاده کنه .
</user_query>
ابتدا کاربرهای تستی `chattest` را پیدا می‌کنم و بعد یک سند جدا برای اعتبارنامه‌ها می‌سازم تا در تست‌های Postman اجباری شود.
Glob مسدود شد؛ با MCP و RTK دنبال کاربران `chattest` می‌گردم.
فایل ساخت کاربران تست پیدا شد؛ الان محتوایش و داکیومنت‌های مرتبط را می‌خوانم.
چهار کاربر پیدا شد. حالا الگوی تست موجود و قاعده‌های Cursor را بررسی می‌کنم تا سند و rule اجباری را درست بسازم.

input.command: Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\Elay_Backend-master\.cursor" -File | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\Elay_Backend-master\.cursor\rules" -File | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\Elay_Backend-master\references" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name

Get-ChildItem "d:\Elay_Backend-master\.cursor" | Format-Table Name, Mode; Get-ChildItem "d:\Elay_Backend-master\references" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name; Test-Path "d:\Elay_Backend-master\references\api-testing-quickref.md"

Get-ChildItem "d:\Elay_Backend-master\.cursor\CreateChatTestUsers" | Format-Table Name; Select-String -Path "d:\Elay_Backend-master\.cursor\*" -Pattern "chattest" -SimpleMatch -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20 Path, LineNumber, Line

Select-String -Path "d:\Elay_Backend-master\.cursor\*.json","d:\Elay_Backend-master\.cursor\*.ps1","d:\Elay_Backend-master\.cursor\*.md" -Pattern "chattest" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 40 Path, LineNumber, Line

content.text: اطلاعات کامل است. سند کاربران و rule اجباری را می‌سازم و به skillهای تست هم ارجاع می‌دهم.

input.contents:
# Postman Integration Test Users (Customer API)

> **Canonical source of truth** for Customer API Postman / Newman integration tests.
> Cursor **MUST** read this file before writing or running any Postman integration collection for Customer features.
> Do **not** invent usernames, passwords, or user IDs. Do **not** use Admin credentials (`a.kashani`) for Customer multi-user flows.

---

## Environment

| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| Bounded context | Customer |
| Base URL (HTTP) | `http://localhost:5144` |
| Login path | `POST {{baseUrl}}/Auth/Login` |
| Shared password | `Test@12345` |
| Seed script | `.cursor/CreateChatTestUsers/Program.cs` |

Start API if needed:

```powershell
rtk dotnet run --project Customer/Api
```

---

## The four ChatTest application users

| Alias | Username | Display name | Phone | UserId | Role in multi-user tests |
|-------|----------|--------------|-------|--------|--------------------------|
| **U1** | `chattest_sara` | Sara ChatTest | `09120000001` | `2746` | Primary actor / initiator |
| **U2** | `chattest_reza` | Reza ChatTest | `09120000002` | `2747` | Peer / acceptor |
| **U3** | `chattest_nima` | Nima ChatTest | `09120000003` | `2748` | Third party / group member |
| **U4** | `chattest_kian` | Kian ChatTest | `09120000004` | `2749` | Fourth party / observer |

> `UserId` values are from the local DB used by existing Chat collections. If login works but profile IDs differ after DB reset, refresh IDs from `GET /chat/profile` (or equivalent) and update this table.

---

## Collection variables (required naming)

Use these exact Postman collection variable keys:

| Variable | Source |
|----------|--------|
| `baseUrl` | `http://localhost:5144` |
| `token_u1` … `token_u4` | Set after each login from `accessToken` |
| `userId_u1` … `userId_u4` | Prefer known IDs above; confirm via Profile when needed |

---

## Login request body (template)

Reuse this body for each user (change only `username`):

```json
{
  "username": "chattest_sara",
  "password": "Test@12345",
  "deviceInfo": {
    "deviceID": "BE2A.250530.026.F3",
    "deviceName": "postman-test-device",
    "deviceVersion": "16",
    "appVersion": "2.113.0",
    "platform": "android"
  }
}
```

### Auth setup folder (mandatory first)

Every new Customer Postman integration collection **must** start with folder `0. Auth (Setup)` that:

1. Logs in U1 → saves `token_u1`
2. Logs in U2 → saves `token_u2`
3. Logs in U3 → saves `token_u3`
4. Logs in U4 → saves `token_u4`
5. Optionally calls Profile for each and asserts `userId` matches the table (or updates variables)

---

## PowerShell smoke login (one user)

```powershell
$baseUrl = 'http://localhost:5144'
$loginBody = @{
  username = 'chattest_sara'
  password = 'Test@12345'
  deviceInfo = @{
    deviceID = 'BE2A.250530.026.F3'
    deviceName = 'postman-test-device'
    deviceVersion = '16'
    appVersion = '2.113.0'
    platform = 'android'
  }
} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3

$login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$baseUrl/Auth/Login" -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $loginBody
$token = $login.accessToken
$headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }
```

---

## Rules for agents

1. **Always** `Read` this file before creating/editing Postman collections or Newman scripts for Customer API.
2. **Always** authenticate with these four users for full multi-actor coverage when the feature involves more than one user.
3. For single-actor smoke tests, still use **U1** (`chattest_sara`) — never a random username.
4. Cite this path in the verification report: `references/postman-test-users.md`.
5. Admin API tests remain separate (`a.kashani` / see `references/api-testing-quickref.md`).

---

## Recreate users if missing

```powershell
rtk dotnet run --project .cursor/CreateChatTestUsers
```
```

---
description: MANDATORY — Customer Postman/Newman integration tests must use references/postman-test-users.md (chattest_* users)
alwaysApply: true
---

# Postman Integration Tests — Mandatory Test Users

## When this applies

Any time the user asks to (or the agent decides to):

- write Postman / Newman **integration** tests
- create or update a Postman **collection** for Customer API
- smoke-test Customer endpoints after implementation with auth
- run full multi-user API scenarios

…this gate is **mandatory**. Skipping it is a policy violation.

## Gate P — Before any Postman/Newman work on Customer API

1. **STOP.** `Read` the canonical file first:
   - `references/postman-test-users.md`
2. Use **only** the four ChatTest app users from that file:
   - `chattest_sara` (U1)
   - `chattest_reza` (U2)
   - `chattest_nima` (U3)
   - `chattest_kian` (U4)
3. Shared password, base URL, `deviceInfo`, login path, and collection variable names (`token_u1`…`token_u4`, `userId_u1`…`userId_u4`) must match that document.
4. Every new Customer collection **must** include folder `0. Auth (Setup)` that logs in all four users and stores tokens.
5. In the chat reply, state explicitly:
   - `Using test users from: references/postman-test-users.md`

## Forbidden

```
❌ Inventing usernames/passwords for Customer Postman tests
❌ Using Admin login (a.kashani) for Customer multi-user integration collections
❌ Hard-coding expired JWT tokens instead of logging in via Auth/Login
❌ Single-user-only suite when the feature requires peer interaction (use U1–U4)
```

## Allowed exception

- **Admin API only** tests → use `references/api-testing-quickref.md` (Admin credentials). Still do **not** use Admin creds against Customer routes.

## Self-check before finishing Postman work

- [ ] Read `references/postman-test-users.md` this turn?
- [ ] Collection Auth folder uses all four `chattest_*` users?
- [ ] Reply cites the file path?
```

When the user asks for Postman integration tests, **or** you build/run a Customer collection:

1. **Read first:** `references/postman-test-users.md`
2. Authenticate with the four ChatTest users only (`chattest_sara` … `chattest_kian`)

### Admin API (HTTP)

| `api-testing-quickref.md` | `verify-feature` | Login + endpoint test (Section 32) |
| `postman-test-users.md` | `verify-feature`, Postman work | Canonical Customer ChatTest users (U1–U4) for integration collections |

| `references/api-testing-quickref.md` | API test scripts |
| `references/postman-test-users.md` | Customer Postman ChatTest users (U1–U4) — mandatory for integration collections |

content.text: چهار کاربر تستی پیدا شد و سند + قانون اجباری برای Cursor آماده شد. ### کاربران (منبع: `.cursor/CreateChatTestUsers/Program.cs` + کالکشن Chat) | Alias | Username | Password | UserId | Phone | |-------|----------|----------|--------|-------| | U1 | `chattest_sara` | `Test@12345` | `2746` | `09120000001` | | U2 | `chattest_reza` | `Test@12345` | `2747` | `09120000002` | | U3 | `chattest_nima` | `Test@12345` | `2748` | `09120000003` | | U4 | `chattest_kian` | `Test@12345` | `2749` | `09120000004` | Base URL تست: `http://localhost:5144` — مسیر لاگین: `POST /Auth/Login` ### فایل اصلی (رفرنس اجباری) **`references/postman-test-users.md`** از این به بعد وقتی بگی «با Postman تست integration بنویس»، Cursor باید اول همین فایل را بخواند و فقط با این چهار کاربر لاگین کند. ### اجبار برای Cursor | فایل | نقش | |------|-----| | `.cursor/rules/postman-integration-tests.mdc` | قانون always-on — بدون این کاربران تست Customer ممنوع | | `references/api-testing-quickref.md` | ارجاع به سند کاربران | | `.cursor/skills/verify-feature/SKILL.md` | در مرحله verify هم اجباری شده | در مرحله بعد کافی است بگی مثلاً: «با Postman برای calendar تست integration بنویس» — Cursor ملزم است از `references/postman-test-users.md` استفاده کند و در جواب بنویسد: `Using test users from: references/postman-test-users.md`
